title: Chemists
description: Conduct qualitative and quantitative chemical analyses or experiments in laboratories for quality or process control or to develop new products or knowledge.

tasks.text: Develop, improve, or customize products, equipment, formulas, processes, or analytical methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze organic or inorganic compounds to determine chemical or physical properties, composition, structure, relationships, or reactions, using chromatography, spectroscopy, or spectrophotometry techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Induce changes in composition of substances by introducing heat, light, energy, or chemical catalysts for quantitative or qualitative analysis.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write technical papers or reports or prepare standards and specifications for processes, facilities, products, or tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain laboratory instruments to ensure proper working order and troubleshoot malfunctions when needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare test solutions, compounds, or reagents for laboratory personnel to conduct tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compile and analyze test information to determine process or equipment operating efficiency or to diagnose malfunctions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with scientists or engineers to conduct analyses of research projects, interpret test results, or develop nonstandard tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate laboratory safety procedures to ensure compliance with standards or to make improvements as needed.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Direct, coordinate, or advise personnel in test procedures for analyzing components or physical properties of materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Purchase laboratory supplies, such as chemicals, when supplies are low or near their expiration date.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
